evidence: Reviewed public API, error handling, and tests

findings.title: Configuration parse errors lose the original cause
findings.why: The wrapper raises ConfigError without chaining, so production tracebacks hide the invalid JSON location.
findings.fix: Catch JSONDecodeError as exc and raise ConfigError(...) from exc.
findings.validation: Add a pytest.raises(ConfigError, match=...) case for malformed JSON and inspect __cause__.

findings.title: Test asserts only that a mock was called
findings.why: The test can pass even if the saved value is wrong, because it checks implementation mechanics rather than observable behavior.
findings.fix: Use a fake repository and assert that the stored item has the expected fields.
findings.validation: Run pytest tests/test_service.py -q and confirm the test fails when the stored value is intentionally changed.
